List all tasks

Source: R/rrq_task.R
rrq_task_list.Rd

List all tasks. This may be a lot of tasks, and so can be quite slow to execute.

Usage

rrq_task_list(controller = NULL)

Arguments

controller

The controller to use. If not given (or NULL) we'll use the controller registered with rrq_default_controller_set().

Value

A character vector

Examples


obj <- rrq_controller("rrq:example")

rrq_task_list(controller = obj)
#>  [1] "83edeaa78fe031a62d1103b7f46b1b91" "1d5a28bb9a53147490b6e808908d1c56"
#>  [3] "45bb1aeb597160b4d0619e0c6cee3982" "c731be70f30cee5c82c64f3eefe4ce44"
#>  [5] "ff7b6c8fd99585133a0f3980248e24c5" "a7bc0fcefcf895e907e27c15f3ebc9f4"
#>  [7] "9d08cff8d3302673a5f4a7ae9cfd1283" "dcd00e9c450feb0e213c20e23f2292d5"
#>  [9] "9c1a623c35bf73bb609612ade4fcfdd5" "8b75bb6c59e9cb5a3af600cdc4052698"
#> [11] "a329170173dba249df5d174dddcd9f52" "f2e6d6e8a4d415357f637d02f261a8c4"
#> [13] "8a44916c095e115c76c57dbea7b4e11a" "46786c73dcf721f8ae8df5582c1ceca0"
#> [15] "7212ec25b1fd9f577083bff3ad99ab98" "305c5265677843c233510a6d4df0e4b8"
#> [17] "c5045ad6e958214ac49a5d495519380a" "e7e9d4377fcaecf8e3290e5382216ddc"
#> [19] "8e9c3e4e0d8de0620085d01f166a0ad1" "a5e478731e1cfae18062432e95f25500"
#> [21] "6eddb665e8c85cfaabe997d67f78f3b5" "5eb5817c81f877c5672cfd186093886c"
#> [23] "920681caa110a5ac18fb3c3f89623456" "5340c7ed930572a8682ab4686d213ce0"
#> [25] "883d1e3ab037271109f033be2364d9dd" "ed41546b1ebbac05bf30c0b450eaa628"
#> [27] "4362a91c1b7aab9ffee45d4bc9464a6b" "d15a3faba365ef9c77d33f5c1da457ef"
#> [29] "4385fc3ba69d759323ed92cb04b7878c" "aac0c575d75c6f0c4b3a48daad87de5d"
#> [31] "66106cfff26644135a991e9b64015810" "533c7aed53d1962fa51db5edc016c909"
#> [33] "7c9d3da17ad05a03f169e39594eaaa3f" "6cb3cfb2c92b05c9ba5211227c8c3a12"
#> [35] "14992575e8df3b15a5710af4e2416bda" "ab42a9711389d93e5c8bd0f26c1b6067"
#> [37] "888312efd8f793e31e3a46ddbefd3274" "c74dcd2e85676caa219fc60a2032ed91"
#> [39] "1903218137f4454975c0fa4591d2b8ae" "d1ac02f7756d37ee72a40013a07da116"
#> [41] "fa369da2f51f8c081700f79c05be96c5" "b343ab01b7e8665d600585afd198db50"
